About Me

Hi! I'm Rohit Shelke, a passionate Web Developer with 1 year of professional experience at Walstar Technologies, Kolhapur. I love building clean, responsive, and user-friendly websites and web applications that bring ideas to life.

From pixel-perfect landing pages to full e-commerce stores on Shopify and WordPress, I turn designs into fast, functional digital experiences. Constantly learning new tools to stay ahead in the ever-evolving web world.

  • Custom Responsive Website Development
  • Shopify & WooCommerce Store Setup
  • Webflow & WordPress Development
  • GoHighLevel (GHL) Funnel & CRM Setup
  • React & JavaScript Web Applications

What I am Doing

Web Design & Development

Building beautiful, fast, mobile-first websites using HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and JavaScript tailored to your brand.

E-Commerce Development

Setting up and customising fully functional online stores on Shopify and WordPress / WooCommerce.

No-Code / Low-Code Platforms

Delivering polished sites and funnels on Webflow, GHL (GoHighLevel), and WordPress — fast and cost-effective.

React & JavaScript Apps

Developing dynamic, interactive web applications with React.js and modern JavaScript for a smooth user experience.
